build.beforeBuildCommand: node src-tauri/scripts/validate-tauri-config.mjs && pnpm --filter @pos/api run build && node ../../scripts/package-bundled-backend.mjs && pnpm --filter @pos/web build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://* wss://* ws://*; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Restaurant point of sale for dine-in, takeaway, and payments.
bundle.longDescription: Installable desktop POS with offline-first web client, local thermal printing, and a self-contained Node API bundle (no monorepo at runtime). Installers include embedded PostgreSQL, Prisma migrations, and structured app-data directories for logs, sync, and offline queues on Windows and macOS.
